name: M249 | 雪茄盒
descriptionEn: A strong open-area LMG, the M249 is the perfect choice for players willing to trade a slow fire rate for increased accuracy and a high ammo capacity. It has been spray-painted with a brown and purple vine and flower pattern. \"What are they keeping in there?\"
descriptionZh: 强大的野战轻机枪，对于想要以低射速为代价，换取高精准度和高弹容量的玩家来说，M249 是绝佳选择。 这把武器采用棕色和紫色的藤蔓和花朵图案进行喷涂。 “他们在那里放了啥？”
